top_signals.title: China's Xi to visit North Korea for first time in seven years as Beijing tests its influence over Kim
top_signals.summary: North Korea may use the summit as an opportunity to press for economic concessions or Beijing's "tacit recognition" of its nuclear status, analysts say.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pockit taps shareholders for £13.4m after losses quadruple
top_signals.summary: Pockit has raised £13.4m from shareholders as it seeks to plug growing losses following its acquisition of London fintech Monese. The firm, which offers pre-paid cards to customers without the need for a credit check, said it completed the raise in May 2026 from venture capital investor Concentric as well as Shore Capital-owned investment firm [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
